description: A fluorescent-lit intake lobby with scuffed linoleum floors. A thick plexiglass window separates you from an empty processing desk. Motivational posters peel from the walls.
dayDesc: A fluorescent-lit intake lobby. The overhead tubes hum and flicker. A thick plexiglass window separates you from an empty processing desk.
nightDesc: The intake lobby is dim, half the fluorescents dead. The plexiglass window reflects your silhouette back at you.

exits.description: A long corridor stretches east under buzzing lights.
A loading bay opens to the south.

description: A long institutional corridor with pale green walls and a stripe of maroon paint at waist height. The floor is polished concrete, reflecting the overhead lights in dull smears.
dayDesc: A long institutional corridor. Every footstep echoes. The fluorescents are bright and unforgiving.
nightDesc: The corridor is lit by emergency strips along the baseboards, casting everything in a dull amber glow.

exits.description: The intake lobby lies to the west.
A junction opens ahead to the east.
An examination room door stands ajar to the south.

description: A T-junction where two corridors meet. A directory sign on the wall lists departments in faded stencil. Someone has scratched 'WHY' into the paint beneath it.

exits.description: Corridor A continues to the west.
A wide observation hall lies to the east.
A stairwell descends to the south.

description: A wide hall lined with one-way mirrors on both sides. Behind each mirror is a darkened room. The mirrors reflect you from every angle, fractured and multiplied.

exits.description: Junction B lies back to the west.
A heavy door leads to Ward C to the south.

description: A concrete loading bay with a half-open roll-up door. Crates of medical supplies are stacked haphazardly. The air smells of diesel and disinfectant.

exits.description: The intake lobby is to the north.
An examination room is to the east.
A boiler room lies to the south.

description: A clinical examination room with a padded table under a surgical lamp. Cabinets line the walls, most hanging open and empty. A drain in the center of the floor is stained dark.

exits.description: Corridor A is to the north.
The loading bay is to the west.
A stairwell lies to the east.
A pharmacy counter is visible to the south.

description: A bare concrete stairwell between floors. Graffiti covers the walls in layers — gang tags, pleas for help, crude anatomical drawings. The echo is disorienting.

exits.description: Junction B is above to the north.
Examination Room 1 is to the west.
Ward C lies to the east.
Stairs descend further to the south.

description: A long ward of empty hospital beds arranged in two rows. Curtain rails line the ceiling but the curtains are gone. At the far end, a television mounted to the wall plays static.

exits.description: The observation hall is to the north.
The stairwell is to the west.
A recreation room lies to the south.
A security station with a heavy door is to the east.

description: A reinforced security checkpoint. Banks of dead monitors line one wall. The desk is overturned and a chair lies on its side. A big red security buzzer is mounted on the wall.

exits.description: Ward C lies to the west.

description: A sweltering room dominated by massive industrial boilers. Pipes run in every direction along the ceiling, sweating condensation. The rhythmic clang of expanding metal fills the air.

exits.description: The loading bay is to the north.
A pharmacy is to the east.
An incinerator room lies to the south.

description: A ransacked pharmacy behind a shattered security window. Pill bottles crunch underfoot. The controlled substances cabinet has been pried open, its shelves bare.

exits.description: Examination Room 1 is to the north.
The boiler room is to the west.
The sub-basement corridor is to the east.
A cold draft comes from the south.

description: A low-ceilinged corridor of unpainted cinder block. Water stains streak the walls. Somewhere ahead, a pipe drips with metronomic patience.

exits.description: The stairwell leads up to the north.
The pharmacy is to the west.
A recreation room is to the east.
Solitary confinement lies to the south.

description: A recreation room with bolted-down furniture. A ping-pong table missing its net sits in the center. Board games with missing pieces are scattered across the tables.

exits.description: Ward C is to the north.
The sub-basement corridor is to the west.
A small chapel lies to the east.
An exercise yard is to the south.

description: A small nondenominational chapel. Folding chairs face a bare podium. The overhead light has a warm tint that feels almost intentional. Someone has left flowers — plastic ones.

exits.description: The recreation room is to the west.
An enclosed garden is to the south.

description: A concrete chamber housing a massive industrial incinerator. The iron door hangs open, revealing a blackened maw. The heat is tremendous even with the fires long dead.

exits.description: The boiler room is to the north.
The morgue is to the east.

description: A cold, tiled room with stainless steel drawers lining one wall. The air conditioning still works here, impossibly. The drain in the floor is spotless.

exits.description: The pharmacy is to the north.
The incinerator room is to the west.
Solitary confinement is to the east.

description: A row of narrow steel doors, each with a slot at eye level. The cells beyond are barely wide enough to lie down in. The silence here has a physical weight.

exits.description: The sub-basement corridor is to the north.
The morgue is to the west.
An exercise yard is to the east.
A maintenance tunnel stretches into darkness to the south.
exits.blockMessage: The tunnel entrance is blocked by debris. It might be passable with enough effort.

description: An enclosed concrete yard open to the sky — or what should be the sky. The ceiling is a grid of reinforced glass panels far above. Chain-link fencing topped with razor wire divides the space.

exits.description: The recreation room is to the north.
Solitary confinement is to the west.
An enclosed garden is to the east.

description: An improbable garden thriving under grow lights. Raised beds overflow with vegetables and herbs. The air is humid and green. A hand-lettered sign reads 'THERAPY GARDEN — NO UNAUTHORIZED HARVESTING'.

exits.description: The chapel is to the north.
The exercise yard is to the west.

description: A narrow maintenance tunnel of raw concrete and bundled cables. It stretches further than it should, further than the building's footprint allows. The air tastes of ozone.

exits.description: Solitary confinement lies to the north.
